title: Release Engineer
description:
Zendesk serves 200,000+ organizations across 150+ countries, helping companies deliver better customer experiences at scale.

We're seeking a Release Engineer to join our Customer Service team in Pittsburgh. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Manage software release processes and coordinate across engineering teams
Develop and maintain release automation pipelines using CI/CD tools
Create and maintain release documentation and deployment runbooks
Troubleshoot deployment issues and coordinate incident response during releases
Manage software version control and tag releases appropriately
Collaborate with QA to ensure quality standards are met before production deployments

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent professional experience
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years in release engineering, DevOps, or software operations
skills: Jenkins, GitLab CI, or similar CI/CD tools
